character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A hulking northern berserker in furred leathers and riveted iron hauberk, shoulders draped in wolf-pelt cloak. Two-handed battleaxe gripped across body, small round shield on back painted with a dark-red rune. Braided blond beard, warpaint streaked across bridge of nose, cold blue eyes, teeth bared in a snarl. Dented iron helm with nose-guard, no horns. Breath steams in cold air. Palette: leather brown #6B4423, iron grey #B8B8B8, blood red #8B0000. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
